series_metadata.series_description: The Bid File consists of administrative documents regarding Invitations to Bid(s) and Requests for Proposal(s). The file contains the following items: competitive bid checklist and all documents described in the competitive bid checklist; final copy of RFP or ITB; any addendums to bid, DAS Request to Purchase email; BWC approval to issue letter; signed confidentiality agreements; supplier Q & A; bid opening log; final scoring; supplier award letter and copy of the signed contract.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the Procurement Unit four years after the Bid opening, move to offsite storage. Retain contracts for goods for the length of the contract plus 5 years. Retain contracts for services for the length of the contract plus 9 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in the Procurement Bid File on I drive for the length of the contract plus 5 years and then destroy. Retain contracts for goods for the length of the contract plus 5 years. Retain contracts for services for the length of the contract plus 9 years, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
